title: Activity log for monday doc

posts.author: alenka (Alenka)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When you create a monday doc in a column, there is no activity log, in particular, the “Last viewed” is missing.
This feature is particularly missing when you enter sensitive information in a monday doc and you’d like to track who views it.

Thank you.

What are you trying to achieve

auditing monday doc when in a column
